query: How many paid vacation days do employees receive each year?
ground_truth: Full-time employees receive 20 paid vacation days per calendar year.

query: How many business days do refunds usually take?
ground_truth: Approved refunds are returned to the original payment method within 7 business days.

query: How quickly must security incidents be reported?
ground_truth: Security incidents must be reported to the security team within 1 hour of discovery.
